text: As I pass through the angled corridor into this vibrant, modern space, I am struck by the interplay of logic and imagination suggested on the wall with 'R+D'. The environment feels charged with potential—here, the boundaries between knowing and creating seem to blur. The careful curation of words and images invites me to reflect on the very foundations of progress. I feel curious, inspired, and a bit awed by the melding of physical and abstract possibilities all around me.
